name: corridor-walking
prompt: Medium shot from behind. Brunette woman in elegant dark dress walking through angular military corridor. Running lights along floor, cool blue lighting. Measured pace, back straight. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: convoy-window
prompt: Wide shot. Angular corridor interior, large window showing military transports moving in formation against night sky. Orange engine lights against dark. Cool corridor lighting. Distant silhouette of woman walking away. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

sfx.description: distant rumble of military convoy passing overhead

name: anchoring-gesture
prompt: Medium shot. Dark-haired woman in navy uniform leaning against corridor wall. Confident seductive pose, one hand on hip. Head tilted slightly, knowing expression. Cool blue corridor lighting casting dramatic shadows. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
